word: H5473 - סוּג - çûwg - soog - Set about

sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּג

Transliteration: sûg

Phonetic: soog

BDB Definition:

  1. to fence about
    1. (Qal)
      1. to fence about
      2. fenced about (participle)

Origin: a primitive root [probably rather identical with H5472 through the idea of shrinking from a hedge; compare H7735]

TWOT entry: 1470

Part(s) of speech: Verb
